name: La Scala Chicken Romano
recipeIngredient: 1 small rosemary sprig, destemmed and finely minced
2 6-oz boned and skinned chicken breast halves
romano cheese, freshly grated to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine the batter ingredients; set aside.
3. Slice each chicken breast into three thin medallions, slicing on the bias. Lightly season with salt and pepper. Dredge in a small amount of flour, shaking off excess. Set aside.
4. Make the sauce: Combine shallots, white wine, lemon juice, and vinegar. Reduce until only a small amount of liquid remains. Add the softened butter, stirring continuously, until melted. Add the cream and season with salt and pepper to taste. Heat through and keep warm.
5. Dip medallions in batter mixture until thinly coated. Heat olive oil in a sauté pan and sauté until golden brown on both sides, turning gently so as not to tear the batter coating.
6. Transfer medallions to a baking sheet and bake for 3-4 minutes or until done.
7. Strain the Lemon Cream Sauce (it should be subtle and thin).
8. Plate and serve with sauce and grated romano.
